text_template: Ready to soundtrack your summer? With Red Bull Summer All Day Play, you choose a playlist that fits your summer vibe the best. Are you a festival fanatic, a deep-end DJ, a road dog, or a trail mixer? Just add a song to your chosen playlist and put your summer on track. Red Bull Summer All-Day Play. Red Bull gives you wings. Visit redbull.com slash brightsummer ahead to learn more. See you this summer.
